description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners, featuring a metallic blue finish on the back. The rear side displays a prominent triple-lens camera module housed in a raised square bump at the top left, accompanied by a small flash. The back also features a centered, reflective Apple logo. The front is dominated by a large, edge-to-edge display with minimal bezels and a small notch at the top for sensors and the front-facing camera. The sides are flat and metallic, with subtle button placements visible along the edges. The overall design is minimalist and premium, typical of recent high-end mobile devices.
description: A sleek, metallic blue smartphone with a triple-lens rear camera, edge-to-edge display, and a centered Apple logo on the back.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the metallic blue back, triple-lens camera bump at the top left, flash, and centered Apple logo.
description_view_1: Left edge view highlighting the slim profile and slight protrusion of the camera bump.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the large, edge-to-edge screen with a blue geometric wallpaper and a small notch at the top.
description_view_3: Right edge view showing the flat metallic side and the camera bump's profile.
attribute_brand_logo: A silver Apple logo is centered on the back of the device, reflective and prominent against the blue surface.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a blue geometric wallpaper with intersecting light beams and a dark gradient, with no visible icons, widgets, or notifications.
attribute_camera_placement: There is a triple camera array in a raised square bump at the top left corner of the back, accompanied by a flash module.
attribute_button_layout: Three small buttons are visible on the left edge, likely for volume control and mute; a larger button is likely present on the right edge for power, though not fully visible.
